May the wind always be at your back, and the sun upon your face.

text: The beautiful thing about this music, speaking as a musician myself, is that there is emotion, passion, and beauty in this song and many other songs before it. It's what is missing with 'modern' artists who resort to mainstream appeal and loose their creativity in the process (if they possess any to begin with). This is the music I love - I can go back and forth between this, Maurice Ravel, Claude Debussy, and other composers of past eras without a pain in the world. I love music, truly.
